compiled_state.title: RED: Add fix-bug eval test case for worktree isolation dispatch
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Add a promptfoo eval test case to plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml asserting fix-bug dispatches with isolation:worktree when config enabled. Must FAIL against current fix-bug SKILL.md.

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml (EDIT)

### TDD Requirement
New eval test case must FAIL against current fix-bug SKILL.md.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Eval config has worktree isolation test case
  Verify: grep -q 'worktree.*isolation\|isolation.*worktree' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml

comments.body: AC amendment: Add negative eval test case — when worktree.isolation_enabled=false, assert fix-bug dispatch does NOT include isolation:worktree.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Validation — RED confirmed ✓ (8 passed, 1 failed — worktree isolation positive test fails as expected against current SKILL.md)

comments.body: Fixed: RED eval test cases for fix-bug worktree isolation dispatch added.
